title: Verbose Error Messages Exposing Internal State
description: Returning or logging full stack traces, SQL errors, or internal exception details to end users violates SOC2 CC7.2. This information aids attackers in reconnaissance and can expose architecture details.

finding.message: Verbose error disclosure '{{token}}' in {{file}} at line {{line}} may leak internal state.

references: Return generic error messages to users; log the full detail server-side with a correlation ID.
Disable debug mode and verbose error pages in production configuration.
Implement a global exception handler that sanitizes responses.
Use structured error logging with severity levels and correlation IDs for traceability without exposure.
